'''Televan Koreyy''' was a notorious [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Information broker/Legends|information broker]] who worked in the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Visual" /> Koreyy was the leader of the [[Street Performers And Panhandlers' Guild]] and kept tight control over its members.<ref name="TCG" /> In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of {{Film|I}} in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].</ref> Koreyy spectated the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|podrace]] at a box<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref> belonging to the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Watto/Legends|Watto]].<ref name="Visual" /> He sat next to another Human against the rear wall of the box, behind Watto and the [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Graxol Kelvyyn/Legends|Graxol Kelvyyn]].<ref name="TPM" />

Koreyy could survive with minimal sustenance. He had light skin, long [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], and blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="TCG" /> His outfit consisted of a tan [[Clothing/Legends|tunic]], a gray [[Jacket/Legends|jacket]] with a brown inner layer, brown pants, and brown shoes.<ref name="Visual" />

==Behind the scenes==
Televan Koreyy first appeared as an extra played by an uncredited actor in the [[1999]] [[prequel trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref name="TPM" /> He was first identified in [[2001]] on his card in the ''[[Coruscant Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="TCG" />

A token containing an image of Koreyy's likeness was used to represent [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] characters in [[2000]]'s [[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game|''Star Wars: Invasion of Theed'' Adventure Game]] by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="Invasion">[[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game|''Star Wars: Invasion of Theed'' Adventure Game]]</ref> This token was also used in the 2001 adventure game scenario "[[Signal Interruption]]" to represent the character [[Raymas Daal]].<ref name="Signal">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20010809a|text=Signal Interruption|int=Signal Interruption}}</ref>
